Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Drone strikes in Haiti that killed 1250, 17 children, condemned by rights group 67 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. Okmain: How to pick an OK main colour of an image 236 upvotes, 42 comments
  3. Using Thunderbird for RSS 56 upvotes, 8 comments
  4. Can I run AI locally? 849 upvotes, 226 comments
  5. The Wyden Siren Goes Off Again: We'll Be "Stunned" by NSA Under Section 702 335 upvotes, 102 comments
  6. OpenTelemetry for Rust Developers 10 upvotes, 0 comments
  7. Show HN: Channel Surfer – Watch YouTube like it’s cable TV 386 upvotes, 132 comments
  8. Lost Doctor Who Episodes Found 193 upvotes, 64 comments
  9. Meta Platforms: Lobbying, dark money, and the App Store Accountability Act 1136 upvotes, 477 comments
  10. Executing programs inside transformers with exponentially faster inference 291 upvotes, 113 comments
  11. Mouser: An open source alternative to Logi-Plus mouse software 147 upvotes, 52 comments
  12. Hammerspoon 176 upvotes, 71 comments
  13. Exploring JEPA for real-time speech translation 20 upvotes, 4 comments
  14. TUI Studio – visual terminal UI design tool 531 upvotes, 270 comments
  15. I Found 39 Algolia Admin Keys Exposed Across Open Source Documentation Sites 31 upvotes, 9 comments
  16. Bucketsquatting is finally dead 299 upvotes, 157 comments
  17. MetaGenesis Core – offline verification for computational claims 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  18. New 'negative light' technology hides data transfers in plain sight 50 upvotes, 25 comments
  19. Launch HN: Captain (YC W26) – Automated RAG for Files 43 upvotes, 22 comments
  20. Hyperlinks in terminal emulators 82 upvotes, 56 comments
  21. Show HN: Context Gateway – Compress agent context before it hits the LLM 55 upvotes, 39 comments
  22. Launch HN: Spine Swarm (YC S23) – AI agents that collaborate on a visual canvas 81 upvotes, 64 comments
  23. Qatar helium shutdown puts chip supply chain on a two-week clock 363 upvotes, 344 comments
  24. Stanford researchers report first recording of a blue whale's heart rate (2019) 42 upvotes, 31 comments
  25. Source code of Swedish e-government services has been leaked 192 upvotes, 184 comments
  26. Your phone is an entire computer 215 upvotes, 221 comments
  27. Parallels confirms MacBook Neo can run Windows in a virtual machine 167 upvotes, 223 comments
  28. Elon Musk pushes out more xAI founders as AI coding effort falters 266 upvotes, 374 comments
  29. John Carmack about open source and anti-AI activists 209 upvotes, 299 comments
  30. I beg you to follow Crocker's Rules, even if you will be rude to me 8 upvotes, 17 comments

Last generated 8:00am, 14 March 2026. Source here.
